hero.subtitle: Dedicated to serving the people - Your opinion guides our path

about.title: About the Leader
about.name: Md. Abdul Karim
about.bio: Dedicated to community service for over 20 years. Committed to ensuring education, healthcare, and employment opportunities. Working for the welfare of the people is my life's mission.
about.visionText: To build a well-educated, healthy, and prosperous community where every person can live with dignity.

opinion.title: Your opinions will help shape our national development strategy.

opinion.name: Your Name
opinion.placeholder: Write about your area's problems, development proposals, or any feedback here...
opinion.successDesc: Your opinion has been successfully submitted.

focus.title: Our Priorities
focus.subtitle: Our 13-point action plan for the development of Meherpur
focus.educationDesc: Increasing literacy rate, setting up digital classrooms & ICT labs, emphasizing technical education, and establishing Meherpur University.
focus.healthDesc: Modern medical equipment in health centers, adequate doctors & medicine supply, maternal & child healthcare, and special initiatives for the elderly & poor.
focus.agricultureDesc: Ensuring fair prices for crops. Ensuring fertilizer, seeds & irrigation, making agricultural loans accessible, and encouraging modern agricultural technology.
focus.youthDesc: Establishing local SME industries, launching startup funds, and providing easy bank loans to train youth and create entrepreneurs.
focus.womenDesc: Special training programs for women, micro-credit support, and special industrial incentives for women entrepreneurs.
focus.transportDesc: Initiative to introduce rail communication via Gangni, development of regional roads & highways, construction of bridges/culverts, and modernization of rural roads.
focus.industryDesc: Establishing mango, jute & agro-based industries, special economic zones, and incentives for local industrial entrepreneurs.
focus.drugsDesc: Strict law enforcement to eliminate drugs, increasing awareness, and engaging youth in sports & culture.
focus.cultureDesc: Upgrading Meherpur's tourism to international standards, promoting folk music and Meherpur's heritage globally.
focus.governanceDesc: Transparency in administration, protection of people's rights, and zero tolerance policy against corruption.
focus.environmentDesc: Excavation & restoration of rivers/canals, tree planting, and use of eco-friendly agricultural technology.
focus.sportsDesc: Preserving playgrounds in every union, building sports complexes, and engaging youth in sports & cultural activities to keep them drug-free.
focus.parliamentDesc: Forming 'Meherpur Parliament' with representatives of all parties to ensure transparency and protect Meherpur's interests.
